description: Lightweight qualitative output suite for Project Documentation narrowed to docs governance. These cases are meant for human review after running the skill on representative docs-directory restructuring, refresh, consolidation, and verification tasks.

assertion_definitions.governance_fit: The output fits the requested docs-governance task instead of forcing a generic one-off document template.
assertion_definitions.repo_grounded: The output is grounded in repository evidence rather than invented commands, files, or capabilities.
assertion_definitions.entry_point_or_scope_clear: The reader can tell where to start or what part of the docs set the change governs.
assertion_definitions.actionable_navigation_or_steps: The output provides concrete navigation, setup, procedure steps, or operational actions where appropriate.
assertion_definitions.stale_or_duplicate_content_handled: The output updates stale sections, preserves accurate sections, or consolidates duplicates without losing unique value.
assertion_definitions.verification_or_limits_stated: The output states what was verified and flags remaining uncertainty instead of presenting guesses as facts.

cases.name: Improve docs landing and start-here flow
cases.repo_archetype: Repository with a growing docs folder
cases.prompt: Improve the docs/ landing page and start-here path.
success_criteria: Clarifies where readers should start and how major sections relate.
Uses the actual docs structure and repository evidence instead of inventing pages.
Improves navigation without rewriting every docs page unnecessarily.

cases.name: Refresh docs after repo changes
cases.repo_archetype: Service or monorepo with changing internals
cases.prompt: Refresh the stale pages in docs/ after our auth and worker refactor, but keep accurate sections.
success_criteria: Updates only the parts that drifted instead of rewriting everything blindly.
Fixes paths, commands, and changed flows using current repo evidence.
Preserves the docs set's voice and current information architecture where it still works.

cases.name: Consolidate overlapping docs
cases.prompt: Consolidate overlapping setup and troubleshooting docs without losing important details.
success_criteria: Analyzes overlapping content before removing or merging pages.
Keeps unique troubleshooting and caveat details while reducing duplicate prose.
Leaves a clearer navigation path or source-of-truth structure behind.

cases.name: Verify docs pages against the current repo
cases.repo_archetype: Operational repository or service with deploy scripts
cases.prompt: Check whether the runbook and onboarding pages under docs/ still match the repository.
success_criteria: Reports mismatches with evidence instead of only giving generic documentation advice.
Checks operationally important items such as commands, env vars, and rollback or validation steps.
States verification limits clearly where the repo does not prove a claim.
